name: BrepFaceList
summary: Provides access to all the Faces in a Brep object.

methods.name: Add(Int32)
methods.summary: Create and add a new face to this list. An incomplete face is added. The caller must create and fill in the loops used by the face.

params.name: surfaceIndex
params.doc: index of surface in brep's Surfaces list

methods.name: Add(Surface)
methods.summary: Add a new face to a brep. This creates a complete face with new vertices at the surface corners, new edges along the surface boundary, etc. The loop of the returned face has four trims that correspond to the south, east, north, and west side of the surface in that order. If you use this version of Add to add an exiting brep, then you are responsible for using a tool like JoinEdges() to hook the new face to its neighbors.

params.name: surface
params.doc: surface is copied

methods.name: AddConeFace
methods.signature: public BrepFace AddConeFace(BrepVertex vertex, BrepEdge edge, bool revEdge)
methods.summary: Add a new face to the brep whose surface geometry is a ruled cone with the edge as the base and the vertex as the apex point.

params.name: vertex
params.doc: The apex of the cone will be at this vertex. The north side of the surface's parameter space will be a singular point at the vertex.

params.name: edge
params.doc: The south side of the face's surface will run along this edge.

params.name: revEdge
params.doc: true if the new face's outer boundary orientation along the edge is opposite the orientation of edge.

methods.name: AddRuledFace
methods.signature: public BrepFace AddRuledFace(BrepEdge edgeA, bool revEdgeA, BrepEdge edgeB, bool revEdgeB)
methods.summary: Add a new face to the brep whose surface geometry is a ruled surface between two edges.

params.name: edgeA
params.doc: The south side of the face's surface will run along edgeA.

params.name: revEdgeA
params.doc: true if the new face's outer boundary orientation along edgeA is opposite the orientation of edgeA.

params.name: edgeB
params.doc: The north side of the face's surface will run along edgeA

params.name: revEdgeB
params.doc: true if the new face's outer boundary orientation along edgeB is opposite the orientation of edgeB

methods.name: ExtractFace
methods.summary: Extracts a face from a Brep.

params.name: faceIndex
params.doc: A face index

returns.doc: A brep. This can be null.

methods.name: Flip
methods.summary: Flips the orientation of faces.

params.name: onlyReversedFaces
params.doc: If true, clears all BrepFace.OrientationIsReversed flags by calling BrepFace.Transpose() on each face with a true OrientationIsReversed setting. If false, all of the faces are flipped regardless of their orientation.

methods.name: GetEnumerator
methods.summary: Gets an enumerators that yields BrepFace objects.

methods.name: RemoveAt
methods.summary: Deletes a face at a specified index.

params.name: faceIndex
params.doc: The index of the mesh face.

methods.name: RemoveSlits
methods.summary: Remove slit trims and slit boundaries from each face.

returns.doc: true if any slits were removed

methods.name: ShrinkFaces
methods.summary: Shrinks all the underlying surfaces in this Brep. Sometimes the surfaces extend far beyond the trimming boundaries of the Brep Face. This function will remove those portions of the surfaces that are not used.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: SplitBipolarFaces
methods.summary: Splits surfaces with two singularities, like spheres, so the results have at most one singularity.

methods.name: SplitClosedFaces
methods.summary: Splits closed surfaces so they are not closed.

params.name: minimumDegree
params.doc: If the degree of the surface < min_degree, the surface is not split. In some cases, minimumDegree = 2 is useful to preserve piecewise linear surfaces.

methods.name: SplitFaceAtTangents
methods.summary: Splits the face of a Brep at tangent locations.

params.name: faceIndex
params.doc: The index of the face to split.

methods.name: SplitFacesAtTangents
methods.summary: Splits all of the faces of a Brep at tangent locations.

methods.name: SplitKinkyFace
methods.signature: public bool SplitKinkyFace(int faceIndex, double kinkTolerance)
methods.summary: Splits a single face into G1 pieces.
methods.remarks: This function leaves deleted stuff in the brep. Call Brep.Compact() to remove deleted stuff.

params.name: faceIndex
params.doc: The index of the face to split.

params.name: kinkTolerance
params.doc: Tolerance (in radians) to use for crease detection.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: SplitKinkyFaces()
methods.summary: Splits any faces with creases into G1 pieces.
methods.remarks: If you need to detect whether splitting occurred, compare the before and after values of Faces.Count

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: SplitKinkyFaces(Double)
methods.summary: Splits any faces with creases into G1 pieces.
methods.remarks: If you need to detect whether splitting occurred, compare the before and after values of Faces.Count

params.name: kinkTolerance
params.doc: Tolerance (in radians) to use for crease detection.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: SplitKinkyFaces(Double, Boolean)
methods.signature: public bool SplitKinkyFaces(double kinkTolerance, bool compact)
methods.summary: Splits any faces with creases into G1 pieces.
methods.remarks: If you need to detect whether splitting occurred, compare the before and after values of Faces.Count

params.name: kinkTolerance
params.doc: Tolerance (in radians) to use for crease detection.

params.name: compact
params.doc: If true, the Brep will be compacted if possible.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: StandardizeFaceSurface
methods.summary: Standardizes the relationship between a BrepFace and the 3d surface it uses. When done, the face will be the only face that references its 3d surface, and the orientations of the face and 3d surface will be the same.

params.name: faceIndex
params.doc: The index of the face.

methods.name: StandardizeFaceSurfaces
methods.summary: Standardize all faces in the brep.

properties.name: Count
properties.summary: Gets the number of brep faces.

properties.name: Item
properties.summary: Gets the BrepFace at the given index. The index must be valid or an IndexOutOfRangeException will be thrown.
